[general]
name=Lizmap server
qgisMinimumVersion=3.34
qgisMaximumVersion=3.99
about=This plugin is designed for QGIS server only. For more detailed information about Lizmap, install the other plugin called "Lizmap".
category=Web
icon=resources/icons/icon.png
deprecated=False
server=True
supportsQt6=True
description=Designed only for QGIS server. For QGIS Desktop, install the other plugin called "Lizmap".
author=3liz
email=info@3liz.com
tags=online,server,web,webgis,webservice,webmapping,mobile,publication,wms,wfs,internet,cloud
homepage=https://docs.lizmap.com/current/fr/install/pre_requirements.html#lizmap-qgis-server-plugin
repository=https://github.com/3liz/qgis-lizmap-server-plugin
tracker=https://github.com/3liz/qgis-lizmap-server-plugin/issues
experimental=False
version=2.14.2
commitSha1=f38a1dff0056e5dcc03a5ca9df71084d2f8c2900
dateTime=2026-02-20T16:07:42Z
changelog=
	Version 2.14.1:
	* Fix: Use access control to filter Expression ReplaceExpressionText
	* Fix: Use access control to filter Expression VirtualFields
	* Enforce type annotations and code enhancement
	
	Version 2.14.0:
	* Raise to QGIS Server 3.34 minimum
	* Raise to Python 3.9 minimum
	* Improve support for QJazz
	* Tests: Sanitize/simplify python code
	
	Version 2.13.4:
	* Fix: `legendKeys` has been added in QGIS 3.32 replaced by `legendSymbolItems`
